payload.startup_idea: FAST BookSwap: campus marketplace for used books
payload.task: Design a wireframe for a 'Quick-List' feature that uses ISBN barcode scanning to auto-populate book details and condition fields for sellers.
payload.llm_reasoning: I decomposed the startup into three core pillars: user-centric UX for inventory management, a secure technical architecture for peer-to-peer transactions, and a hyper-local growth strategy focused on campus penetration.

payload.startup_idea: FAST BookSwap: campus marketplace for used books
payload.task: Develop a geofenced authentication system that verifies university email addresses to ensure only students from the same campus can interact in the marketplace.
payload.llm_reasoning: I decomposed the startup into three core pillars: user-centric UX for inventory management, a secure technical architecture for peer-to-peer transactions, and a hyper-local growth strategy focused on campus penetration.

payload.startup_idea: FAST BookSwap: campus marketplace for used books
payload.task: Create a 'Campus Ambassador' referral program that incentivizes student leaders to register their textbooks on the platform before the start of the semester.
payload.llm_reasoning: I decomposed the startup into three core pillars: user-centric UX for inventory management, a secure technical architecture for peer-to-peer transactions, and a hyper-local growth strategy focused on campus penetration.

data.value_proposition: FAST BookSwap connects students within the same campus to buy, sell, and trade textbooks affordably and sustainably.

personas.name: Sarah Student
personas.pain_point: High cost of new textbooks from the campus bookstore.

personas.name: David Graduate
personas.pain_point: Difficulty liquidating used books at the end of the semester for a fair price.

personas.name: Professor Pringle
personas.pain_point: Ensuring students have access to affordable course materials to improve class participation.

features.name: ISBN Scanner
features.description: Quickly list books by scanning the barcode to auto-fill details.

features.name: In-App Secure Messaging
features.description: Safe communication channel for buyers and sellers to coordinate meetups.

features.name: Campus Verification
features.description: Email-based authentication to ensure only students from the same university can trade.

features.name: Wishlist Notifications
features.description: Get alerted when a book on your course syllabus is posted for sale.

features.name: Safe Exchange Map
features.description: Suggested public, high-traffic meetup locations on campus for safety.

user_stories: As a student, I want to scan my textbook's ISBN so that I can list it for sale in seconds.
As a buyer, I want to filter books by my specific campus so that I can arrange a local pickup without shipping costs.
As a student, I want to receive notifications for my required textbooks so that I can purchase them before they sell out.
data.reasoning: These choices focus on reducing friction for students (scanner) and prioritizing safety (verification/meetup map), which are the two primary blockers for peer-to-peer campus marketplaces.

payload.details: Landing page generated with hero section, CTA button, features list, and email capture form using LLM.

content.email_subject: Stop overpaying for textbooks at your campus
content.tagline: The smartest way to trade campus textbooks.
content.description: FAST BookSwap makes it easy to buy, sell, and trade textbooks with fellow students right on your campus. Our platform uses verified student accounts and an ISBN scanner to ensure every transaction is secure and textbook-accurate.
content.cold_email: Hi there, I know how frustrating it is to pay hundreds of dollars for textbooks that you only use for a semester. We built FAST BookSwap to help students on our campus save money by trading directly with each other. With our built-in ISBN scanner and secure messaging, you can offload your old books or find your next semester’s reading list in seconds. Check out the app and start saving today.
content.twitter_post: Stop getting ripped off by the bookstore. FAST BookSwap is officially live, helping you trade textbooks with classmates safely and affordably. Scan, chat, and swap your way to a cheaper semester. #StudentLife #BookSwap
content.linkedin_post: Textbook costs remain one of the biggest financial burdens for students today. I’m excited to share FAST BookSwap, a platform designed to foster a sustainable, peer-to-peer marketplace for academic resources. By verifying campus emails and streamlining the swap process, we are making education more accessible and affordable for everyone. Join our community and change how we trade textbooks.
content.instagram_post: Ditch the bookstore markup. 📚 FAST BookSwap is the new way to get the books you need for class without breaking the bank. Use our ISBN scanner to list your old books or find new ones from students right here on campus. It’s safe, simple, and sustainable. Link in bio to join the swap!
content.slack_message: Hey everyone! If you’re looking to save some cash this semester, check out FAST BookSwap. It’s a dedicated app for our campus to buy, sell, and trade textbooks securely. You can scan your books to list them instantly and chat with classmates directly through the app. Highly recommend checking it out before the semester hits!
